summary: Sprint PR #1303 (closes #955/#957: TS→Go hook delegation) is CONFLICTING after PR #1300 merged (complete Go kernel, 145x faster, 2ms vs 290ms). CI cannot run on #1303 until conflicts resolved. Senior coder must assess: (1) does TS delegation remain relevant given #1300 fully replaced TS with Go? (2) rebase or close #1303? PR #969 confirmed merged (closes #964). No P0/P1 issues open. PR #1317 (Gemini adapter tests, 4/4 CI green, copilot squad) is ready for human review.
